gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
